global.title: Ebola outbreak in central Africa sparks global concern - CNN
global.summary: CNN reports growing concern over an Ebola outbreak centered in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, raising fresh public-health fears beyond the region.
global.whyItMatters: Health crises quickly become prayer, compassion, and mission concerns for the global church.

global.title: May 15: Terror suspect arrest, Trump and Xi summit - NBC News
global.summary: NBC’s roundup highlights an Iran-linked suspect accused of terror plots on Jewish sites in the U.S., alongside fallout from the Trump-Xi summit.
global.whyItMatters: This touches both congregational security and the wider climate of fear affecting Jewish neighbors and interfaith relationships.

global.title: Trump praises 'rich and enduring' U.S.-China relations - NBC News
global.summary: Following the Beijing summit, Trump publicly emphasized warmer U.S.-China ties, signaling a softer tone even as Taiwan, trade, and regional tensions remain unresolved.
global.whyItMatters: Major-power relations shape economic stability, conflict risk, and the global anxieties people bring into church life.

canadian.title: Yanik Guillemette: Bill C-22 Sparks International Alarm as Tech Giants and VPN Providers Warn Canada Risks Digital Flight - markets.businessinsider.com
canadian.summary: A growing coalition of tech firms and privacy advocates is warning that Bill C-22 could weaken encryption confidence and push investment, talent, and infrastructure away from Canada.
canadian.whyItMatters: Digital privacy, trust, and public policy increasingly affect families, ministry communications, and the ethical climate pastors must navigate.

canadian.title: Post Market Wrap: May 15, 2026 - CNBC
canadian.summary: CNBC’s market wrap notes that Canada is welcoming Chinese EVs to its market, adding a fresh angle to Canada’s trade and industrial posture amid shifting global alliances.
canadian.whyItMatters: Trade decisions affect affordability, jobs, and public sentiment in ways that shape pastoral care and community conversations.

local.title: Air 4 Adventure: Artists find inspiration in nature - KXLY.com
local.summary: A regional feature highlights artists drawing creative inspiration from the natural world, offering a gentler community story amid heavier headlines.
local.whyItMatters: This is a useful reminder of beauty, creativity, and common grace that can enrich preaching and local encouragement.

persecutedChurch.title: J'lem church leaders urge Knesset to address 'hate crimes' against Christians - Haaretz
persecutedChurch.summary: Church leaders in Jerusalem told a Knesset committee about spitting, kicking, stone-throwing, and intimidation against Christian clergy in the Old City, pressing for stronger action.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a direct concern for prayer, advocacy, and solidarity with Christians facing hostility in the land of Jesus’ ministry.

persecutedChurch.title: Trump administration will join a prayer gathering criticized for promoting Christian nationalism - AP News
persecutedChurch.summary: AP reports that administration officials will participate in a prayer gathering drawing criticism for blurring faith, politics, and Christian nationalist themes.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Pastors need clarity in distinguishing faithful public witness from the misuse of Christian language for political power.

leadership.title: Faith As A Leadership Discipline: The Practice That Sustains Change - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece argues that leaders sustain hope and change through disciplined practices like silence, prayer, compassion, rest, and relational presence rather than constant urgency.
leadership.whyItMatters: A pastor-leader can draw from this as a timely reminder that durable ministry flows from spiritual depth, not nonstop output.

goodNews.title: Palma’s Picks: The inspiring stories of strangers
goodNews.summary: Global News spotlights stories of ordinary strangers whose acts and testimonies are lifting others and strengthening communities.
goodNews.whyItMatters: These kinds of stories help a pastor notice and celebrate everyday grace, kindness, and hope.
